---
title: "The Team"
subtitle: "CSM TraceForce"
date: "June 10, 2026"
toc: false
---

Three analysts, two cats and one embargo that did not stand a chance. We built the visual analytics tool that follows the signals back to the messages that prove them.

::: {.team-grid}

<!-- Animated avatars: replace the .jpg with an animated mark_avatar.gif or .webp
     (the <img> plays it automatically), or swap the <img class="avatar" ...> for
     <video class="avatar" src="images/mark_avatar.mp4" autoplay loop muted playsinline></video>
     for a video clip. The video is styled to match in styles.css. -->

::: {.member-card}
<img class="avatar" src="images/mark_avatar.jpg" alt="Mark Yee">
<div class="member-name">Mark Yee</div>
<div class="member-role">Lead Investigator</div>
Keeper of the deerstalker and the master plan. Pins channels to the board, mutters "follow the messages" at the screen and stops the cat from sitting on the keyboard mid-render.
:::

::: {.member-card}
<img class="avatar" src="images/serene_avatar.jpg" alt="Serene Cheng">
<div class="member-name">Serene Cheng</div>
<div class="member-role">The Judge</div>
The calm at the centre of the storm. While the embargo leaks and the agents lose their heads, she quietly decides what actually counts as a breach. The gavel is mostly decorative.
:::

::: {.member-card}
<img class="avatar" src="images/carina_avatar.jpg" alt="Carina Faith Peh">
<div class="member-name">Carina Faith Peh</div>
<div class="member-role">Forensic Analyst</div>
Reads the evidence and the agents' private thoughts with equal delight. No keyword slips past her across the rounds, and she insists the whole thing stays tidy while she is at it.
:::

:::

## Project contributions

Everyone had a hand in every part. The table marks who led each area and who supported it.

| Area | Main | Support |
|---|---|---|
| Project direction | Mark | Serene, Carina |
| Data preparation | Mark | Serene, Carina |
| Network analysis | Serene | Mark, Carina |
| Activity and bypass analysis | Serene | Mark, Carina |
| Topic and evidence analysis | Carina | Mark, Serene |
| Shiny app and website | Mark | Serene, Carina |
| User experience and design | Carina | Mark, Serene |
| Report and documentation | Carina | Mark, Serene |
| Poster design | Serene | Mark, Carina |
